name: Keep Alive (Request)
desc: Server sends a keep-alive ID that the client must echo back in C00PacketKeepAlive.

fields.name: id
fields.desc: Random keep-alive ID to echo back

modules.name: PingSpoof
modules.purpose: Delay/cancel incoming keepalive. PingSpoof delays S00 and sends back C00 with modified key. Disabler cancels S00 entirely. Backtrack buffers S00 for delayed processing.

modules.name: Disabler
modules.purpose: Delay/cancel incoming keepalive. PingSpoof delays S00 and sends back C00 with modified key. Disabler cancels S00 entirely. Backtrack buffers S00 for delayed processing.

modules.name: Timer
modules.purpose: Delay/cancel incoming keepalive. PingSpoof delays S00 and sends back C00 with modified key. Disabler cancels S00 entirely. Backtrack buffers S00 for delayed processing.

modules.name: Backtrack
modules.purpose: Delay/cancel incoming keepalive. PingSpoof delays S00 and sends back C00 with modified key. Disabler cancels S00 entirely. Backtrack buffers S00 for delayed processing.
